task: _posixify in utils.py turns an app name into a posix-friendly token. Simplify the space-to-dash conversion.
correctness_argument: `'-'.join(name.split()).lower()` splits on any run of whitespace (tabs, multiple spaces, newlines) and collapses them into a single dash. Leading/trailing whitespace is dropped. The resulting token is identical to what the original function always produced, so existing config directories are found unchanged.
